title: lomatium nevadense var. cupulatum
intro: Lomatium nevadense var. cupulatum, also known as Nevada lomatium, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carrot family, Apiaceae. It is commonly found in the mountainous regions of the western United States and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of infections. Herbal preparations of Lomatium nevadense var. cupulatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
